archetype: Archetype 4 (Swiss & High-Contrast) adapted for Institutional Trust

layout.sidebar: Collapsible left navigation (w-64 expanded, w-16 collapsed) separating the 4 user roles.
layout.spacing_scale: Generous internal padding for cards (p-6), tight gaps between cards (gap-4 or gap-6).
layout.card_style: Flat background (#FFFFFF), 1px subtle border (#E2E8F0), no default shadow. Hover: slight lift (-translate-y-1) and shadow-lg.

components.stat_cards: Top-Left North Star metric prioritized. Include small trend sparkline (Recharts) or +/- percentage indicator. Use `data-testid='stat-card-metric'`.
components.data_tables: Shadcn UI tables. Left-aligned text. Sticky headers. Use badge components for status (e.g., Ativo, Pendente, Urgente).
components.real_time_queue: Grid or list view with prominent countdown timers (using monospace font for numbers). Critical times pulse with `accent_alert` border.
components.patient_timeline: Vertical stepped list (like a clinical timeline). Use dots and vertical lines. High contrast dates.
components.prescription_form: Shadcn UI forms. Multi-step or grouped fields (Paciente, Medicamento, Posologia). Use searchable select/combobox for CID/Medicines.

interactions.hover: Background darkens or border changes to primary color. Explicit text color definitions.

instructions_to_main_agent: Use Manrope for headings and IBM Plex Sans for body. Configure Tailwind to load these.
Implement Recharts for Secretário dashboards (Bar charts for previsão de demanda, Line charts for NPS/Trends, Donut for mapa de gargalos).
Use Phosphor Icons or Lucide-React for clean, institutional iconography.
Ensure the sidebar navigation is accessible and supports the 4 roles cleanly.
Avoid generic Tailwind blue/purple. Stick strictly to the defined color palette to maintain the 'SUS Trust' identity.
Forms must use Shadcn components extensively, especially for the Gov.br mock login and digital prescriptions.
